properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the quiet, in the stillness I know that You are God In the secret of Your presence I know there I am restored

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When You call I won't refuse Each new day again I'll choose

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is no one else for me None but Jesus Crucified to set me free Now I live to bring Him praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the chaos, in confusion I know You're sovereign still In the moment of my weakness You give me grace to do Your will

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So when You call I won't delay This my song through all my days

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All my delight is in You Lord All of my hope, all of my strength All my delight is in You Lord forever more
